arcade-buildout.intent: Turn the Arcade mockup into the real Carter's Arcade: Vite + vanilla TS static MPA with 12 playable games (6 hub cartridges, 6 cabinets) on the click-to-wake cartridge model, deployed on Vercel at arcade.cartercripe.com

signals.message: SEQUENCING DEVIATION (Builder-directed): feat/launch starts BEFORE the cabinet partitions, branched from feat/hub-games (unmerged). Launch tasks 70 (LIVE flips, cabinet bests) and the cabinet halves of 71 are deferred until feat/cabinets-action + feat/cabinets-puzzle land; a11y/payload/naming/README proceed now. Cabinet partitions must re-run the launch checklist items on their surfaces when they start.

FROZEN-LAYER CHANGES on feat/launch (a11y pass, task 72): tokens.css --sub darkened #a1a1aa → #52525b (WCAG AA small-text contrast); arcade.css .cab--soon now dims sprite only (was whole-card opacity — killed pill contrast); base.css underlines links inside .tiny/footer + .panel h2.panel-heading joins the h3 rule; src/ui/cabinet.ts legend heading h3 → h2.panel-heading, sound button aria-label dropped (visible text is the name). Cabinet partitions inherit these — no action needed, but re-run Lighthouse on new cabinet pages.

SEQUENCING NOTE: cabinet partitions were built stacked (feat/cabinets-action on feat/launch, feat/cabinets-puzzle on feat/cabinets-action). Merge order: hub-games -> launch -> cabinets-action -> cabinets-puzzle (or a single merge of cabinets-puzzle carries all four). Launch task 70 was completed inside the cabinet partitions.

token-system.intent: Add a gamified token economy to Carter's Arcade: earn/spend tokens via gameplay, achievements, daily leaderboards, and riddles/tasks; new Next.js backend + admin dashboard at dev.cartercripe.com/arcade; Discord bot integration via a published API contract (bot built separately by Carter).

feat/foundation.intent: Scaffold, shared runtime (hub/cartridge, storage, audio, input, loop, screen), styles, sprite pipeline, card/cabinet scaffolds, Vercel deploy config

feat/hub-games.intent: Full hub page (header, ticker, grids, scoreboard, legend) + six hub cartridges: port Dino Run, 2048, Token Miner; build Simon, Memory, Lights Out; style-guide page

feat/launch.intent: Launch partition (Builder-rescoped: runs BEFORE cabinets): a11y pass + fixes, payload audit, naming double-check (Simon), README game guide; cabinet-dependent items (LIVE flips, cabinet bests) deferred to post-cabinets; domain cutover + analytics verify remain Builder-manual

feat/cabinets-action.intent: Action cabinets: Snake, Bricks, Aim Trainer on the shared cabinet scaffold; owns cabinet-entry.ts; flips their hub cards LIVE (stacked on feat/launch per Builder-directed sequencing)

feat/cabinets-puzzle.intent: Puzzle cabinets: Minesweeper, Water Sort, Setrit on the shared scaffold (tested logic.ts each); flips their hub cards LIVE (stacked on feat/cabinets-action)

feat/backend-foundation.intent: Scaffold arcade-backend/ Next.js project: Drizzle schema, Neon Postgres, Auth.js (Google), ledger write helper, games seed
